This is device-level privacy, not multi-user cloud authentication. Do not use a shared device.

Data safety

Backup & Settings

Export regular backups. Browser data can be lost if storage is cleared or the device fails.

Supabase cloud

Admin cloud login

Sign in to sync orders, workers, logs and media across devices.

↓

Export backup

Download all orders, workers and logs as one JSON backup file.

↑

Restore backup

Restore a previously exported Khairpur Admin JSON file.

CSV

Export records

Download orders or worker directory for spreadsheet use.

!

Privacy reminder

Customer and worker phone numbers are personal data. Restrict device access and never share raw backups publicly.

Production upgrade recommended

For automatic website lead capture, multiple staff accounts, cloud sync and remote access, connect this dashboard to a secure backend with role-based authentication and encrypted database storage.
